title: RationaleField
description: Reusable rationale descriptor for governance events and decision records. Rationale is not a CRD spec field; it lives exclusively in GovernanceEvent. CRD specs do not carry rationale fields.

text.description: Human-readable rationale text explaining the decision or change. Minimum 10 characters, maximum 2000 characters.

decisionAuthority.description: The role or principal that holds decision authority for this change (e.g., Platform Governor, Schema Engineer).

alternativesConsidered.description: List of alternative approaches that were considered and rejected before this decision was made.

regulatoryReference.description: Optional reference to a regulatory requirement, compliance framework, or legal obligation that motivated this decision.
